name: Gems
description: Gems are collected throughout BattleBlock Theater.  They are the primary currency for freeing new Prisoners when in the game, but of course can be traded for anything.

name: Yarn Ball
description: Yarn is by far much more rare than Gems.  It's the primary currency for bribing the Cat Guards for new weapons, but of course can be traded for anything.

name: Cousin Zack
description: This is Zack.

name: Rigel
description: Brother to Nigel. This fraternal twin hangs on the side of the triangles though suffers the same occular limitations as his brother.

name: Baker
description: The Royal Triangle Navy left Baker with a pair of sea legs and an unquenchable thirst for the open sea. Drink up! There's plenty!

name: Banana Man
description: Ooh ooh ah ah?

name: Sir Silvergrill
description: After slaying Dribbles the Sea Dragon, Sir Silvergrill later opened an online dragon skin belt store.

name: Isosceles II
description: Isosceles II's tomb was his first, and last, self-portrait.

name: Snow
description: Winter is coming. We're on a tropical island though, so it should be pretty nice.

name: Walter
description: Walter suffers from an overwhelming sense of self consciousness. Luckily being holed up a ship for months on end followed by prison, tends to tear down such social barriers.

name: Sly
description: Sometimes being stealthy just means being mindful of your surroundings. And gaps of course.

name: Secret Mission Guy 2
description: Finding gems is way harder when everything looks green, but he wanted a challenge.

name: Shock Victim
description: This one has a long history with objects with electrical properties. He may no his way around a zapper block, but the encounter may prove too traumatic.

name: Beats
description: Playing good songs in good orders got this one a job aboard the S.S. Friendship. But I'll let you in on a little secret... they're not headphones.  They're actualy ear muffs. Shhhhhhhh.

name: Beetie
description: An unparalleled affinity for the red nectar of the beet.  You see it's a noble vegetable, but virutally untradable with Cat Guards.

name: Grotto
description: This one time my friend Tots and I were at an 80s party.  We both wore hats because we were hat buddies. He was a bit confused about multi-themed rooms and worried about his glasses or something.  I was obviously busy having a sporting time in my new hat.  You see it'a hat.  Did I mention I love hats?

name: Crow's Feet
description: Once a growth market, scarecrow mask design has evoloved over the years.  From mere burlap sacks tied off at the base, to knitwear and intricate cross-stitching.  Recent advancements show that 1/4 of the time these garmants may or may not work on cats.

name: Horace Headcavity
description: One ill-fated bike ride away from his prime. To be fair, it would have been really hard to find a helmet with his head shape.

name: Bird Boy
description: Being cross-bred with a bird can have its advantages when you're on a prison island. Less so if the bird you were bred with was flightless.

name: Girp
description: After fulfilling the family mission to smite Poiseidon, he was left with a sense of emptiness after shipwrecking. Directionless he awaits a cause.  A cause that will reignite the fire in his heart that once burned with family fueld gold old fasioned vegeance.

name: Pierre
description: Won the award for Best Actor. Thanked no one.

name: Drive-thru
description: A french fry man stranded in a popcorn world. Luckily for him, the stench of fried potatoes will never leave him.

name: Ramekin Eyetalker
description: It's rude to stare, even if you're from a galaxy far, far away.

name: Centipete
description: Puking on your food before eating it is clearly superior to all of the hard work that goes into chewing. Try it on date night: they'll appreciate the way you work smarter, not harder.

name: Carl Clubs
description: Of all the theaters in all the world, he had to walk into this one.

name: Rice Pilaf
description: During a molecular gastronomy experiement, this side dish dollop found his way into a rice ball case and blammo! Rice pilaf ball!  A gastronomical sensation amongst peers.

name: Leo
description: Shouting about where you are will never get you where you want to go.

name: Purrtricia
description: Several incidents with the guards and some yarn resulted in some electro-zapper block therapy.  This once feral creature now sits catatonic in a cell with the look of emptiness in her eyes.  Quite tragic really.

name: Sniffy Sniffs
description: An answer for kitten farts. Of course, the smell of plastic and rubber is far worse.

name: Cornelius Smallbladder
description: Discovered the "Wimplification Theorem", resulting in new products like the Suds Tuff line of soft-sponge dumb bells.

name: Timber Jim
description: Won a free cruise after donating the most at his neighborhood, "Homes for Squirrels" lumber fund drive.

name: Gertrude
description: Combined with her hat, she makes up 2/3rds of the food pyramid.

name: Baby Clown Hair
description: Like baby teeth, baby clown hair is eventually replaced by adult onset clown hair.

name: Wax On
description: This whole mess would have been solved by a montage weeks ago, but he lost his cassette player in the shipwreck.

name: Nikola
description: These glasses are needed for his experiments.  Oh, the experiments are in modern dance.

name: Princess Tee hee
description: Her Highness, the lady of giggle-snorts, heiress to Fannyfield Home.

name: Amphibalope
description: Amphibalopes were once bred for size and storage capacity, and they were the leading walk-in animal of their day. The species took a big hit in popularity once someone invented a closet that smelled less terrible and was less likely to die.

name: Spectacular Tufts
description: Little known fact, duckshark meat is rich in vitamins and oils that are great for your hair.  Leaving you with a rich, full, luster and tufts not unlike the duckshark.

name: Dragonhead
description: He may not have wings or fire breath, but at least his face looks like a hideous reptile monster.

name: mogu
description: Sociopathic megalomaniac. It all started with a cracker, and now he wants more...

name: Angry Andy
description: Life lesson of the day: don't let yourself be defined by the shape of your eyebrows. Unless you're like Andy and that's the best thing going for you.

name: Geordie Manflakes
description: See those things on his head? Some kid stuck those on back in 3rd grade and he still hasn't noticed.

name: Humphrey Rodriguez
description: Notorious pinch-hitter. Seriously, watch out: first he pinches you, and then he hits you right on the nose.

name: Cyber Manny
description: Read the fine print when shopping on Cyber Monday. Sometimes its a discount laptop, and sometimes its a discount laptop with an agreement to donate your body to medical experiments. Long story short, Cyber Manny.

name: Earl
description: Order in the court!  I have a wig!

name: Reverse Merman
description: Being a reverse merman has a TON of benefits, survival-wise: gills for below water, lungs for above. Webbed toes that walk as well as they swim. Of course, the species is doomed because no girl will ever kiss one.

name: Persius
description: Abandoned by his father, Poseidon, after he accidentally spat in his mouth.

name: Eleanor Gogglenobs
description: Eleanor had the misfortune of losing an engine, ejecting, and parachuting onto the S.S. Friendship.  Lost at sea or on an island prison, she replays that day in her head over and over asking herself, "Why was I doing barrel rolls in my prop plane?"

name: Nostridomus
description: Nostridomus can smell the future, and the future smells like prison and litterboxes.

name: Kirby Lobewax
description: Kirby looks forward to a bright future of easy-access ear hair removal.

name: Pretty Please
description: #He'd always meant to get it checked out, but the staff at Yogurt Palace had been surpringly good with sudden head trauma.

name: Farmer Phil
description: Gonna eat your grains and brain your knowledge.

name: Benedict
description: Master detective. Brain like an encyclopedia. Utterly ruined by the invention of the internet.

name: Noir
description: Back in eleventy-eleventeen they didn't call them juiceboxes.  Instead they were called, er,  juice glasses.

name: Up All Night
description: She once found herself in a shopping mall made up entirely of coffee shops. After surviving on caramel, espresso and biscotti for 3 weeks, she finally escaped into the blinding sun. She has not slept since.

name: Skin Flap McZak
description: He started peeling at the tender age 162.  Now his flaps just flap about, but he does not see it anymore.  They are a part of him much like a limb or and eyeball or hair folicle.

name: Pineapple Pete
description: The failed mascot for Antarctic Pineaples.

name: Surpreyes
description: There is such a thing as too much depth-perception.

name: Trinoceros
description: When you're flashing this much ivory, it's not a bad idea to hire a lookout.

name: Roscoe
description: Surprisingly, once you grow your hair out long enough, you go from being hairy to furry. Fluffy even. Roscoe, you have arrived!

name: Barnaby
description: Did you know his bite is somewhere around 1800 pounds per square inch? Someone should of told him that when he was behind bars.

name: Chef
description: This goatee makes my food taste good.

name: Willie the Kid
description: Turns out, being a train robber is a lot less complicated than being a boat robber.

name: Vinegar Cheeks
description: Some people pickle cucumbers. Some onions and carrots. This guy pickled his head. This is what happens when you pickle your head.

name: Sven
description: Have you ever tasted sadness? I have. For he was my friend.

name: Rosencrantz
description: Shakespeare is by far more difficult to communicate via antennae. Truly the next level in theater can neither be seen nor heard.  Unless! it's say a battle type of theater...

name: George
description: This is George.

name: Roboturd
description: How does the saying go? Every creature on the planet poops alone?

name: Barry
description: Bears have a long and fascinating history on the stage. Barry, however, is just a guy with an outer ear condition.

name: Dan
description: The best guy I've ever known!

name: Reginald
description: Still feels really good about being called a genius.

name: Gaz
description: Gaz suffers from a gatro intestinal ailment called galdskjg;alskdjgfksldjgfalsd.

name: Stephen
description: A former stock broker turned philanthropist. Stephen is a big softie.

name: Born With It
description: How does he do it? Simple: cat oil. How you get cat oil is less simple.

name: Depth Perception
description: Thank goodness the world is only 2 dimensional.

name: Happy
description: That's right.. you shouldn't judge a book by its cover. Nah, I'm just kidding: this guy is a huge bummer.

name: Lightning
description: He got made fun of growing up.

name: Gordon
description: Molecular gastronomist and inventor of seaweed pie. Life on the island has elevated his creative juices only to be shackled by the tyranny of his wet food loving captors.

name: Simon
description: An outlaw with a heart of gem. A heart of yarn. Sprmfff. A heart of heart.

name: Dental Bill
description: Deceptively expensive. Total gem digger.  Insurance just doesn't cover the stuff he demands.

name: Henrietta
description: Henrietta went on a voyage once.  A voyage that lasted 19 years.  Landed her in the paper and everything.  She was going somewhere.  Then the cats came.

name: Shapes
description: Comatose for 10 yrs, Shapes found solace at sea.

name: Lee
description: Lifts boxes nearly all day.  Writes music all night. No ability to be upset.

name: Jed
description: Jed will get you rich, just get him out of prison and he'll show you.  You can trust him.

name: Carrots
description: Carrots are a great source of Vitamin K. What happens when you go over your daily recommended dose of Vitamin K? This. This happens.

name: Ian
description: Ian is best friends with Lee.

name: Fuji
description: A thousand strikes!

name: Abe
description: Abe doesn't say all that much but I think he's got a seriously deep soul.

name: Jackson
description: Jackson really likes his blanket.

name: Thomas
description: From barrister to politician to inmate.

name: Customer Service
description: Generally irritated, but he'll get you what you need.

name: Billy
description: Pretty sure this isn't his real name, but we all call him this in the slammer.

name: Sweet Tooth
description: A face full of pain and no regrets.

name: Socks
description: A quiet life filled with warmth and love.

name: Nikoli Piecovchit
description: A relic of the cold war, Nicoli longs for a simpler time.n

name: Clock Cat
description: Clock Cat knows the exact time of your death, but all he does is make that face...

name: Reverse Toast Guy
description: It didn't catch on. Its just not toast without that little butt shape on one end.

name: Home Remedy
description: Has a smartphone handy at all times.  Freaks everyone out.  Never diagnose yourself through the internet.

name: Aaron
description: Aaron's favorite stage of grief is denial. That and chapter 4-5.

name: Blooky
description: Blooky went on an adventure with Stumble Buns.  They were in a boat, just like Hatty and his friends.  It's crazy.  It's almost like the same story except no real conclusion until THIS story.  The one you're playing right now.

name: Calvin
description: Only the smell of fear motivates Calvin to act. And when he does... it is nothing short of glorious.

name: Stumble Buns
description: Some say I'm a dreamer...

name: Crazy Eyes
description: Descended from a long line of trackers.  Crazy Eyes eats, breathes, and sees via... his mouth.

name: Beezle Bug
description: No description needed. Shhhhhhhh.

name: Cease and Desist
description: Only the smell of fear motivates Calvin to act. And when he does... it is nothing short of glorious.

name: Sebastian
description: He was WITH him in the bookstore.  He was WITH him in the swamp.

name: Octopeyes
description: Symbiosis presents itself in many forms.  This is not one.

name: Pre-dater
description: Hunger. Hunger for the salty sea air and the briney taste of seawater that surrounds fresh prey. Hunger.

name: Eye Strain
description: Seriously, just stop staring for a few seconds every hour.

name: Casserole
description: The taste of goodness is like chicken casserole for the soul.

name: Scuttlebutt
description: Muffled to the MAX

name: Vomitous Tots
description: Vomitous Tots only writes about himself in the third person, see?  This way you don't know if someone else wrote it or Vomitous Tots wrote it, see?  Keeps things a little hazy, see?

name: Gruyere
description: The buggy bumpers are comin' OFF!

name: Flowers
description: It's a buyer's market..........for now.

name: Charlotte
description: Porcine is sublime, but only when you're on time.

name: Terry
description: How to keep a cool head under pressure: just add water

name: Bulbus
description: An abandoned amateur clay sculpture, Bulbus still (somehow) manages to function.

name: Chutney
description: From the family of condiments, this mixture of spices and vegetables will leave you both confused and possibly aroused.

name: Captain Chrysanthimum
description: "That's the last turd out of you, Captain Chrysanthimum!!" said the evil villain.

name: Stanley Tinyhat
description: Stanely's hat is the only object that connects him to his past life.n

name: Pickles
description: Master of standing on a ball with one foot while smelling his armpits. Pickling is a rather complex form of chemistry that requires not only brainpower, but appendage dexterity.

name: Tinsel Atwater
description: Mumified at the tender age of 162, only to awake a prisoner of brick and fabric.

name: Hark
description: Hypoallergenic being of love and domestication.

name: Tender Vittles, Sloth Extraordinaire
description: Supple-limbed, tree-top sweetie. Also, delicious.

name: Brutus
description: The cats took over just moments before the great ape rebellion. Years of planning, wasted.

name: Aloysius
description: Thinker and cat lover, Aloysius is deeply saddened by the kitty uprising. Consumed by frustration he turns to etching prisoner portraits on the walls of his cell.

name: Ruggedly handsome man from my dreams
description: Once lost in the dreamstream only to be discovered in the forefront of your dream teams.

name: RazzleDazzle
description: More glitz, more gravy.

name: Poopdeck Paulie
description: Its hard to find work as a poopdecksman when so few ships have a poopdeck anymore.

name: FizzleSticks
description: You gonna eat your fish sticks?

name: Mom
description: Mother of Children. Motherlike figure. Mom.

name: Dad
description: Father figure. Domestic patriarch. Pops.

name: Butterscotch
description: Yet another pet quickly named by people who weren't all that creative.

name: Honeycubes
description: Actor extraordinare.  You may have seen him in such games as Castle Crashers and Cardinal Sin Society.

name: Ninetynine Percent
description: His Occupy BattleBlock Theater movement was so successful that they wouldn't let him leave.

name: Hanx
description: I had this beard wayyyyyy before it was cool. I also had a palatial estate, but it was not as cool.

name: Badger
description: This one time when I was a child I attended a super hero party.  I put on a mask and went to the party only to find it wasn't a super hero themed party.

name: Tots
description: This one time I went to an 80s party.  I had slotted plastic glasses on.  When  I realized it wasn't an 80s party, I removed my glasses, but kept the hat.

name: Cool Kid
description: A shield against UV rays.  He's constantly indoors, though.  In prison.  Not really sure why he's still wearing them.

name: Binky
description: I don't always go by the name Binky, you know.  It's just a nickname.  I went by this nickname for so long I can barely even remember my one true name

name: Socket
description: Don't worry; it won't hurt if you poke Socket's eyes with coins or paperclips. It will make you a jerk though.

name: Seeds
description: They say that it's what's on the inside that counts. Nobody has ever said that about Seeds, mostly because his insides are gross.

name: Kev
description: A doctor would be very handy in BattleBlock Theater if everyone wasn't fine one moment and dead the next.

name: Dixon
description: I'm fine with eyes that draws you in... I'm not fine with eyes that make a sucking sound at the same time.

name: Kazu
description: Kazu's listened to many stories about the "land of one thousand battling blocks". Maybe he could have escaped if he'd spent more time practicing his "ninja vanish" instead.

name: Olaf
description: Dock2B: The S.S. Friendship. Dock22B: The S.S. Brothbeard. Even vikings need to pay attention to details sometimes.

name: Butterfly McKenzie
description: Boxing may have left him with twisty-ears and a toothless smile, but just look how happy he is!

name: Stamps
description: Yet another victim of toxic adhesives and a solemn reminder as to why we all switched to e-mail in the first place.

name: Mister Wonderful
description: The pageant circuit did a number on this one.

name: HampsterSword
description: It wasn't until the moment the prison door closed when he learned the true meaning of solitude... only to realize he had been alone his entire life.

name: Momo
description: Momo is a chubby little rabbit.  Thanks for rescuing her.

name: Secret Sam
description: Sam's identity isn't a secret because of his diguise, its just because no one cares. Like, at all.

name: Billy Skinless
description: Skulls are dime-a-dozen in BattleBlock Theater. You're probably standing on one right now.

name: Time and not space
description: Ethereal.  Slightly upset.  Very consistent.

name: Robbin' Good
description: Stealing is wrong, except for when it feels right.

name: Flappy Flappington
description: He can turn into a flock of bats and do anything he wants.  Except he doesn't ever choose to do this because he likes a challenge.

name: Maggie
description: Maggie generally tends to get very cold ears once the temperature drops.  She wears this just in case it happens again.

name: Mr. Serious
description: It's just a name.  Why does everyone think a name is going to determine whether or not he's going to giggle all the time???

name: Meteor
description: Named himself after the very thing that killed everyone he knew, so he'll always count his blessings.

name: Mutey
description: Whatsamatter? Cat got your... oh.

name: Bookie Boy
description: Bookie Boy runs up and down the stairs until he has nearly 250 times the recommended cardio activity per day.  And yet he'll keep going until someone takes the "bookie" away.

name: The Pharaoh
description: If pharoahs are good at anything, it's making death look CLASSY. Which, you have to admit, is an important skill for any BattleBlock Theater performer.

name: Frenchie McTwist
description: After retiring from a legionnaires life, parting with the helmet was too much. Helmets are extensions of the self and therefore must be worn with conviction and pride.

name: Pleasant Peasant
description: Customer service skills are really important when you're dealing in fine muds and novelty muck.

name: EyeLids McBirthWater
description: You may never be as cute as a panda, but then, you never had to be a naked worm crawling around on your mother's fur. Seriously, have you seen what they look like as newborns? Yuck.

name: Cleo
description: No. It's just a coincidence she's named that. I mean when she was a baby she didn't have that hair or anything. So it's not like anyone saw it coming and named her that on purpose.

name: Betty the Yeti
description: Betty loves to compare snowflakes.  She believes that two snowflakes might actually be the same.

name: Mildred
description: You may have heard about how blind people can be really great at hearing things. Well, Mildred can't hear, see or smell, but she can find out everything she needs to know by tasting things. You do not want her to find out about you.

name: Jack Runningback
description: Its a good thing the rest of the team is there, because this guy runs the wrong way EVERY TIME.

name: Clever Girl
description: One of the alpha-cooperators of the Jurrasic era.

name: Mouth
description: Sentient eyeballs are more rampant than you think.  Seriously.

name: Pistachio PepperPants
description: A prisoner of suave distinction. Enjoys the finer things such as mustache oil and hat smuggling.

name: Margaret
description: Fresh out of the finest salon the world's ever seen!

name: Commander & Me
description: Commander is pointing right at a super secret escape hatch. Too bad Me can't see which way that is.

name: Tubey
description: Is it a nose or an ear? Both actually. This is Tubey smelling the sound of footsteps. Poor Tubey.

name: Crispy Exterior
description: I bet you even use him with the Fireball. Nerd. Nah, just kidding-- wizards are way cool.

name: Surly Stu
description: Surly Stu has had enough of your nonsense.

name: Giovanni
description: Dashing. Dangerous. Debonnaire. FAST.

name: Alistair
description: It's complicated.

name: Cabeza en Fuego
description: Victorious otra vez!

name: Ed
description: Former metal shop teacher turned artist, Ed now spends his time creating rather than educating. He does what he likes to call, Metal Origami.

name: Wearing your face on my face
description: A timeless tradition championed by the unlikely.

name: Paloma
description: She's got a thing for treefrogs.

name: Angry Faic
description: When mere words are not enough.

name: Supple Headwound
description: This little one is highly susceptible to lacerations and spontaneous hemorrhaging.  This bonnet is both fashionable and functional.

name: Svelt
description: Paranoia and limited eye contact plague the everyday ongoings of this up and comer.

name: Ordolot'KSyufivnd
description: Splurkt ukt brca pntl fln.  Fln.

name: Secret Mission Guy 1
description: Former MI5 agent reported missing in action, but since resurfaced in a remote island prison...

name: Penelope
description: Constantly misbehaving, yet loyal.

name: Herbert
description: A young runaway found himself in a neighboring gasket manufacturing plant.  There he accidently boarded a shipping container and was whisked away to the unknown.

name: Greasegiver Hobblewiggins
description: Stereophonic aural happiness ensues when least expected. Too bad the CD skips everytime he double-jumps. Wait, you guys do remember CD's, right?

name: Eduardo
description: Lizard, iguana or gecko? Eduardo can be whatever you want Eduardo to be.

name: Coco
description: This would have been a great disguise for an abandoned island if not for the great Cocobutter Purge of 1850.

name: Imposter
description: If all the ducks are sharks, then who are the ducks?

name: Cousin Wesley
description: This is Wesley

name: Nigel
description: Custom monacles are surprisingly cheap.

name: WeeWee
description: Some would say a scoundrel. Otheres, a rascal. WeeWee will have to learn what it takes to survive in BattleBlock Theater.

name: Franklin
description: Grows imitation beards and sells them on the black market. Led his younger brother Cranberry astray.

name: Serioustown
description: This man is permanently less than indifferent.

name: Ivan
description: Fabled lost cosmonaut has in actuality been misadventuring with this group of castaways.

name: Biggs Hoson
description: You can't stare into the building blocks of life itself without consequence.

name: 2-Ply
description: Mummies make great friends because their plumage is naturally soft and absorbant: you can cry on their shoulder for days.

name: Safety First
description: This is actually a medically prescribed helmet.  True story.

name: Cristoff
description: This one time Cristoff went on a family vacation and was introduced to oysters for the first time.  Changed his life. When he grew up he went to a restaurant and to his surprise what he thought were oysters were actually soy beans.

name: Marco
description: The worst part about a face-ectomy is that people don't know where to look when they're talking to you, and it makes everyone uncomfortable. The mask helps.

name: Pearce
description: Haunted by a gluten allergy that was diagnosed until recent.  Unbeknownst for years while living on garlic bread.

name: Champion
description: Just think of the bacon make-outs...

name: Crikey
description: Crikey and Arnold were found on a life raft in the middle of the ocean.  Close to starvation these two found a home aboard the SS Friendship.

name: Arrrrrrrrrrrrrrnold
description: Arnold has adapted to life aboard the SS Friendship, and looks forward to starting his own line of sea salts.

name: Porcini
description: Delicously smelly goodness, yet dangerously sweet.

name: Davey
description: Thanks again, Davey... for everything.

name: Dorchester
description: Precision.  A steady hand. Dorchester is by far one of the most excellent bowlers anybody has ever been lucky enough to witness.

name: Jasper
description: #Who wants a hug?

name: Zip
description: Mums the word. It's also the only word Zip knows.

name: Kawalsky
description: Ship's engineer. Prefers arc welding to oxy-fuel

name: Cranberry
description: Younger brother of Franklin. Less successful than John-Paul.

name: Chester
description: A shell of his former self.  Once a great explorer, now sits quietly in his living quarters drawing diagrams of litterboxes.

name: Cheeseborough
description: What can I say? The man knows how to clamp!

name: Trevor Papermill
description: Hairstyles come and go, but beards are for Trevor. Errrrr.

name: John-Paul
description: A well-groomed beard is enough to keep John-Paul happy.  Though he feels Franklin is biting on his style a bit.

name: Sygourney
description: Known for amazing hair, this one has starred in multiple BattleBlock Theater promotional advertisements.

name: Pepper
description: Prisoner by day. Origamist by night. Professional hanglider in dreams.

name: Pascal
description: Be very, very careful. For Pascal's attenae do absolutely nothing at all but make you look foolish!

name: Fleur de sol
description: A little of this, a little of that.  A dash of prison, a smidge of theater.  Voila!

name: Hibiscus
description: This is what happens when you drink seawater daily.

name: Yuzu
description: Sweet and sour and full of zest.  Yuzu has untamable sass that does not mesh well with his fellow captives.

name: Plane Jane
description: Turbines are for circle heads.

name: Conseco
description: Mouth full of flys. Full of them.

name: Sleepover Simon
description: Be sure to look under your bed.

name: Matthew
description: Player of games. Trusted confidante.

name: Sir Sneak-a-Peek
description: Of noble birth, Sir Sneak is the last in a long line of donut critics.

name: Aloe
description: Sentient aloe leaf broken and dried, but filled with life and fervor.

name: The Babysitter
description: Charges way too much an hour to sleep on your couch.

name: Greystone
description: Traumatized by a car accident involving a truck filled with carrots.  Greystone has turned carrots into carrot... cake and owns a carrot cakery back home.  Some day after being freed he will return and take up his mantle as head patissiere.

name: Skids
description: Dashing, dapper, debonnair. Skid knows not what these words mean.

name: Verisimilitude
description: There are over a dozen puppeteers hidden within Verisimilitude. It gets cramped sometimes.

name: Rawls
description: After a childhood food incedent involving rock candy, Rawls underwent a highly experimental jaw sugery that infused him with a metal mandible.

name: Susie Q. Anthony
description: Solving mysteries may come naturally to some girls, but sometimes you also upstage the police and end up in prison run by cats.

name: Brianne
description: Of course, he didn't know how small his brain actually was until it was too late. Now everyone just points and laughs...

name: Smelford Tibblefast
description: Lost his tail in Act 1. Everyone tells him that it will grow back. Some day.

name: Spork
description: Dual purposed duality.

name: Aquarius
description: If you've ever wanted to live on the edge, try snorkeling. 2 inches up and you're breathing, 2 inches down and you're drowning.

name: Easter Al
description: A monumental failure back at home, his performances since then have mostly been a bust.

name: Easter Elle
description: Always supportive of her big brother, even when he fails.

name: Gun Show
description: That will be two tickets, please.

name: The Witchdoctor
description: Do you believe? do you believe the mystical arts?  Do you believe in...

name: Team Spirit
description: Watches you sleep.

name: Walter
description: A collector of fine confections.

name: Schmucko
description: Brother to the Orange Princess, Schmucko has a chip on his shoulder. I assume it honks and squirts water like everything else he owns.

name: Winter is Coming
description: Devourer of man. Blood as cold as ice and spit as sharp as icicles.

name: Don'tLookAtMe
description: Eyes so beautiful one cannot gaze for more than a second before being hypnotized by their beauty.

name: Eric
description: Turntablist, musician, and author. This guy literally wrote the soundtrack to the prisoners lives.

name: What is that thing?
description: Rule #1: never be the first to fall asleep at a sleep-over. Just don't.

name: Mermon
description: Ice fishing can be dangerous.  I mean, what if the fish pulled you into the hole?

name: drizzle
description: Was attending a slumber party with his friend, Grizzle, and woke up in jail?

name: grizzle
description: One moment, I was at a slumber party.  The next... jail.

name: Silent but Deadly
description: Like a smell that cannot be seen. Or and odor that cannot be heard.  He exists in the in between.

name: Gunther
description: Lost at sea for years aboard a derelict freighter. After finding a viking cap inside of a shipping container, Gunther has since found a new purpose in life.

name: Pluto
description: I'm not a planet.  I'm a prisoner!

name: Alien
description: Where is my spaceship!?!?

name: Fat Kid
description: Fat Kid spent many-a-day running around with Alien, and just look at him now!

name: FBI Agent 1
description: This operative's investigations were cut short when a bevy of freakish felines captured his attention. Along with the rest of him, for that matter. Or was that his plan all along...

name: FBI Agent 2
description: Unable to recall if he was Agent 1's exit plan or escape route, Agent 2 allowed his capture in order to ask Agent 1 directly.  This plan seemingly backfired.

name: Thief
description: The Thief's archery ability will not score him a role in a feature film anytime soon. Though appearing in two games ain't too shabby. Watch out though.  He tends to take extra slices on pizza day.

name: The King
description: He knows a thing or two about the value of green gems.

name: Rammy
description: Rammy evolved just in time to be locked up in BattleBlock Theater. Some ungulates have all the luck.

name: Giraffey
description: Buy your official Behemoth brand Giraffey keychain and phone charm today! SOOOO CUTE!

name: Knight
description: Sorry, just the one; your other Knights are in another Castle. Crashers.

name: Barbarian
description: Bearing the ceremonial helmet of his forefathers is really just an excuse to play in the dirt and be extra rowdy.

name: Swamp Bro
description: Maybe if he'd kept up on his washing, we'd never know that he was from the swamps. Then again, a bro's gotta represent. No really- if a bro ever stops representing, they die. Kinda puts all that boasting in perspective.

name: Troll
description: Ah yes, homo trogloditus... better known as the common troll. Nearly hunted to extinction for their obnoxinary glands, trolls have seen a recent population explosion in the digital age.

name: Toast
description: A toast, to Toast! It's delicious!

name: Jonny Four
description: The last robot of his line (for legal reasons), Jonny 4 is just as good at catchphrases as the 5th model would have been, had that model ever been built before starring in a movie that was fun for the whole family.

name: Duck Shark
description: Strange that only prisoners and Duck Sharks are able to blow themselves up. Yeah, you forgot how weird that was, didn't you?

name: Turkey
description: Turkeys have adapted to their gluttonous environment by always presenting a moving target, and in Turkey prisoner's case, also by growing thumbs. Seriously, would you eat something with thumbs? Yech.

name: Santa
description: You'd think that after so many years of social service, someone would have tried to break Santa out by now. This makes Santa sad.

name: Cyber Monday
description: Seems like it's cyber month these days.  Know what I mean?

name: Winston
description: Dan's best friend, companion, inspiration, lover, confidante, and enabler. Oh and he makes this squeek that doesn't sound doglike at all.  Like he swallowed a toy or something.

name: Ms. Pump
description: If wearing your heart on your sleeve isn't sensitive enough for you, please consider wearing your heart directly on your face. They'll know how you feel, and you'll know how they feel. Terrified, most likely.

name: Rose
description: The sum of its petals. When coming together it assembles into a Valentine's Day treat.

name: Groundhog
description: Neither grounds nor hogs. Just cosmic karma.

name: Buckle Your Pants
description: If you choose to do this, whatever you do, make sure you leave the fly down.

name: Furbottom
description: Self-made billionaire, cat fanatic, and theatrics afficianado.

name: Boot
description: A wise old cobbler predicted the singularity would occur in technology. I'll give you a guess as to what field.

name: Tooth Brush
description: The last of his kind. Tooth Brush was marooned after a failed colonization attempt by his people. Tooth Brush is not alone in this world for he finds comfort in exchaning stories with his friend, Boot.

name: Blocketeer
description: Why would you expect him to come with a rocketpack? Copyright infringement aside, BattleBlock Theater is just lousy with the things.

name: Siren
description: Legends say, Sirens once lured sailors to their doom. Really? I don't get the appeal.

name: Mr. Bobbins
description: Mr. bobbins is not just a prisoner of the theater.  But a walking prison in his own head. No, literally his head is prison to a symbiotic wormlike lifeform that feeds off him daily.

name: Snail
description: What you really don't want to see is when he sucks his whole body up into that shell. Or maybe you do, you molluscophile, you.

name: Wheels
description: Earings, hats, headbands, headphones, earmuffs, bandanas. We're thinking too small here. Cars. Accessory of the future.

name: Cat Control
description: Yeah.

name: Hooshmand the Wise
description: Originally released on National Cat Day.  This ol' scholarly feline is filled with sage-like meows.

name: Snakeface
description: Some people just get a snake tattoo'd to their chest. We call those people wimps.

name: The Final Unicorn
description: This is it: this is the last unicorn you get. We're putting our foot down.

name: Hatzilla
description: We all know the power of hats.

name: Boom!
description: Sure, you could use him with the Grenade, but that's a little on the nose, don't you think? Try the flying disc instead; it is the gentlemen's weapon of choice.

name: Mr. Peabody
description: You see there was this minor laceration that got infected. It needed bandaging and you know, just spiraled out of control from there.

name: Lava Lamp
description: Being the embodiment of grooviness is almost worth having a head made out of glass.

name: Gerard
description: Gerard's opposable face is what separates him from lesser primates. He'd explain all of the advantages, but he doubts you could keep up.

name: I SEE YOU
description: When you're dealing with mystical forces you see a lot of crazy things.  Sometimes those things are ducksharks, or cursed hats, maybe talking car heads.  And sometimes they're four eyed head things that stare right into your soul.

name: Manbirth
description: Look this happens all the time. It just doesn't get that much coverage in the media, but more common than you would think. Like blue ice.

name: Peeps
description: Ever since his first rollercoaster ride, Peeps has not been able to wipe that smile off of his face. Everybody thinks aliens are in search of resources or colonization.  No no,  rollercoasters. Currency of the future.

name: Donut
description: It's super rude to look through the hole. Not only is Donut self-conscious about his lack of jelly-filling, but his eyes are also UP HERE.

name: Scuba Steve
description: You might be wondering why he still dies when he jumps in water. May I direct you to the oxygen pack NOT mounted on his back?

name: Paul
description: Evil never sleeps, and neither will you once you've signed up for the Platinum Paul Package. No refunds or cancellations accepted.

name: Sausage
description: "Let's all go to the lobby... let's all go to the lobby... and find ourselves some meat!" Some recurring dreams are the wurst. Hah!

name: 25% off
description: When you ask them to take a little bit off the top, maybe you should be more specific.

name: 50% off
description: Not ever having to pay for optometrists, hair care products or nose-hair trimmers make up for most of the savings alone.

name: The Nose Knows
description: Nobody nose how he ended up in BattleBlock Theater, but if you're looking to blow away the competition, choosing him just makes good scents.

name: Moose
description: A beautiful creature. A majestic beast. A total jerk at the local bowling alley.

name: Little Feets
description: The discarded stilts and unzipped costume lay beside a trail of unnaturally small tracks. The legend of Bigfoot had ended, but the legend of Little Feets was just beginning...

name: The Monster
description: Paleontologists will tell you otherwise, but let's face it: there is exactly zero difference between dinosaurs and monsters. What they call the "Mesozoic Era", I call 180 million years of sheer terror.

name: The Dad
description: Don't argue with The Dad or he'll tell you what it was like when he was your age. He will also tell you to stop talking back to your mother, which is a bit creepy.

name: Meebs
description: After losing his lightbulb eyes, Meebs was left to wander the planet blind.  Until one day this walking sconce found his way onto a certain friendly boat.

name: Gluten
description: A delicious little healer.

name: Steamroll Victim #1
description: I think it's safe to say by now that his head is never going to go back to it's original shape.

name: Steamroll Victim #2
description: Flattery will get you no where. Get it? FLAT-tery!

name: Cecil
description: If you came from where Cecil came from, you'd think he was handsome. You would both be wrong.

name: Triple Threat
description: Quite the lady's man. Lady's men? But the only thing worse than a love triangle is a love hexagon.

name: Tiny Monkey
description: He is a monkey with a tiny head. WHAT MORE DO YOU WANT?

name: Behemoth Chicken
description: Our logo, our mascot, our inspiration. With slightly bigger eyes of course.

name: Tiny Cyclops
description: All of the depth perception of the cyclopedians of myth, none of the grandeur.

name: Exploding Disc
description: Your first weapon! The Disc can be used to stun opponents when thrown. When landing, it will then explode after a short period.

name: Grenade
description: Tried and true. Throw it and it explodes on impact or on a timer.

name: Boomerang
description: The boomerang flies out and back to its thrower. If a prisoner or cat is hit, it will be stunned for a short time. The boomerang can also be used to grab gems and yarn from afar.

name: Dodgeball
description: This is primarily a stun weapon that will bounce around after its initial toss. The Dodgeball can also be used to jump off of

name: Fireball
description: Fireballs ignite opponents upon contact. While ablaze, players can touch other players (Friends and Foes) to set them on fire as well.

name: Ice Cannon
description: Fires two rounds (ice blocks) at a time and at varying trajectories. Ice blocks will freeze opponents on impact.

name: Fan
description: The Fan will push opponents away when used in close proximity.  The Fan can also be used to deflect most weapons.

name: Vacuum
description: Not sure what brand it is, but it sucks objects toward the user.  Be it projectiles or other players.

name: Dart Gun
description: The Dart Gun fires a dart that will stick to most surfaces and knock down characters it hits. Darts that are stuck to a wall can be used as platforms and will un-stick after a short time.

name: Forceball
description: The Forceball is a timed weapon that fires away and upward. At the end of its timer, it explodes, sending off a circular wave of force.

name: Paper Airplane
description: This remarkable piece of engineering generally flies in a straight line until it hits something. Pressing the weapon button again while in flight or while it is crumpled will cause it to explode.

name: Frog Bomb
description: The FrogBomb is moving proximity bomb. It will traverse all types of terrain and will explode upon contact with an opponent.

name: Acid Bubble
description: The Acid Bubble will dissolve opponents when coming into contact with its sides or bottom. It is also a utility weapon in that you can jump off the top of it.
